title: rubus costifolius
intro: Rubus costifolius, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Indian raspberry, is a species of thorny shrub native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antidiarrheal, antiviral, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Rubus costifolius include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and treat various infections, such as diarrhea and respiratory issues. Rubus costifolius is often prepared as a decoction, powder, or juice, which can be used to treat various health conditions, and it is also used in traditional herbal preparations.
